_comment: Bifrost configuration used during product evaluation testing
_note: Bifrost was run via 'npx -y @maximhq/bifrost' with Web UI config mode (config_store enabled). Providers were configured via the Web UI at localhost:8080. This file documents the configuration state, not the actual config file used (which is in config.db).
